content: We can hypothesize that induction heads (the Transformer attention substructures that encode human-like episodic memory properties including temporal contiguity, primacy, and recency) can act as an intrinsic curiosity signal for ICM-powered autonomous agents, replacing the ICM's traditional prediction error-based novelty metric. This works because attention activation strength for rare, unintegrated episodic events directly correlates with how novel and information-rich an observation is for the agent.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
trigger_topic: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
